name: an-dr-view-online
description: Status bar buttons to open the current file (and line) on GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket. Remote is detected automatically from git.

commands.title: View Online: Open File at Current Line
View Online: Copy URL at Current Line

viewOnline.remote.description: Git remote name to use when building URLs (e.g. 'origin', 'upstream').

viewOnline.defaultBranch.description: Fallback branch name when the current branch cannot be determined from git.

enumDescriptions: Open the URL in the default browser.
Copy the URL to the clipboard.
Open in the browser AND copy to clipboard.
viewOnline.openTarget.description: What to do with the generated URL when a status bar button is clicked.

viewOnline.showStatusBar.description: Show or hide the status bar button.

viewOnline.statusBarAlignment.description: Which side of the status bar the button appears on.

viewOnline.statusBarPriority.description: Priority of the status bar item (higher = further from center).

viewOnline.includeLineOnClick.description: When clicking the status bar button, include the current line number in the URL.

viewOnline.useSelectionRange.description: When there is an active selection, use the start–end line range (e.g. #L10-L20) instead of a single line.

viewOnline.customHostMap.description: Map custom git host domains to their web URL base. Useful for self-hosted GitLab. Example: { "git.mycompany.com": "https://git.mycompany.com" }
